name: methodic
description: Call Chronicle experiment-tracking tools directly from Claude Desktop — no SDK install.
long_description: Methodic's MCP server for Claude Desktop. Exposes Chronicle's `chronicle.*` tools — internal role-filtered search over past experiments and research docs, experiment/variation create/read/commit, lifecycle (move/delete/retract), report write-ups, dataset + image upload, ACL management, and run-log search — talking straight to your Chronicle server. Reuses the same `~/.methodic` credentials as the CLI/SDK; local-file uploads are streamed presign → PUT → finalize so the bytes never pass through the model. This is the same `server.js` the Claude Code plugin runs, packaged for one-click Desktop install.

api_key.title: Methodic API key
api_key.description: Your sk_... key from the Methodic UI (API keys). Leave blank to reuse ~/.methodic/credentials.yaml if you already ran the CLI setup.

server_url.title: Chronicle server URL
server_url.description: Override the Chronicle API endpoint. Leave the default unless you self-host.

scribe_url.title: Scribe URL (optional)
scribe_url.description: Enables run-log search (the search_logs tool). Leave blank if unused.
